class.name: CMMagnetometerData
class.brief_description: A single magnetometer sample produced by [CMMotionManager].
class.description: Wraps Apple's [code skip-lint]CMMagnetometerData[/code]. Provides the raw magnetic field reading in microteslas along each device axis. Includes bias from device magnetic interference. For a bias-corrected value, use device-motion updates and read [member CMDeviceMotion.magnetic_field] instead. See Apple's [url=https://developer.apple.com/documentation/coremotion/cmmagnetometerdata]CMMagnetometerData reference[/url].

members.member: Magnetic field strength along each axis in microteslas (µT).
The time at which the sample was taken, in seconds since device boot.
